title: Lam Wing-Kee, Hong Kong Bookseller Who Defied Authorities, Dies at 70
summary_full: One of five booksellers kidnapped by Chinese officials in 2015, Mr. Lam spoke out after his release and became an international cause célèbre.
summary_public: One of five booksellers kidnapped by Chinese officials in 2015, Mr. Lam spoke out after his release and became an international cause célèbre.
